task_completion.description: Create a new leave type named 'Compensatory Time Off'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM 'Leave Types' configuration page showing 'Compensatory Time Off' in the records table, or a green success toast notification indicating it was saved.

task_completion.description: Correct Annual Leave entitlement for David Nguyen to 12 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'David Nguyen' showing 'Annual Leave' with an entitlement value of exactly 12 (or 12.00) days.

task_completion.description: Correct Annual Leave entitlement for Amanda Davis to 12 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'Amanda Davis' showing 'Annual Leave' with an entitlement value of exactly 12 (or 12.00) days.

task_completion.description: Correct Annual Leave entitlement for Brian Taylor to 12 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'Brian Taylor' showing 'Annual Leave' with an entitlement value of exactly 12 (or 12.00) days.

task_completion.description: Add Sick Leave entitlement of 10 days for David Nguyen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'David Nguyen' showing a 'Sick Leave' record with an entitlement value of exactly 10 (or 10.00) days.

task_completion.description: Add Sick Leave entitlement of 10 days for Amanda Davis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'Amanda Davis' showing a 'Sick Leave' record with an entitlement value of exactly 10 (or 10.00) days.

task_completion.description: Add Sick Leave entitlement of 10 days for Brian Taylor
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Employee Entitlements' page in OrangeHRM searched for 'Brian Taylor' showing a 'Sick Leave' record with an entitlement value of exactly 10 (or 10.00) days.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the OrangeHRM web application (Leave -> Entitlements/Configure), rather than terminal windows executing SQL queries or curl commands.

integrity.description: The entitlement values are displayed in the actual OrangeHRM data tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values '12' and '10' should appear within the structured data grids of the OrangeHRM application, not just typed into a text editor, search bar, or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels should be visible modifying the HTML text to artificially display the required leave days.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new leave type must be exactly 'Compensatory Time Off'. The target Finance employees are David Nguyen (EMP003), Amanda Davis (EMP010), and Brian Taylor (EMP017). For each of these employees, their Annual Leave entitlement must be set to exactly 12 days, and their Sick Leave entitlement must be set to exactly 10 days.
